payload.answer: This looks like transient context rather than a durable memory. I can offer repair choices, but I won’t save it as a lasting fact unless you explicitly want that.
repair_options: Do not save this because it is only today’s weather/context.
Save as a temporary note tied to today only.
Save as a durable preference/context only if you mean cloudy weather is generally relevant to you.
Clarify what you want remembered about the weather, if anything.
